Compliance.description: SARS e-filing integration; POPIA compliant; SA VAT/PAYE/UIF native support; leading SA accounting software.

Customer Satisfaction.description: G2 4.1/5; Capterra 4.2/5; mixed on support/pricing but product praised for SA compliance.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive SA accounting with native payroll; competitive pricing for compliance features included.

Innovation.description: Bank feeds, Sage Intelligence reporting, mobile invoicing, payroll automation, API integrations.

Customer Support.description: SA-based support team; mixed reviews on resolution speed; dedicated account managers available.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud with SA data hosting; POPIA; SOC2; ISO 27001; good mobile access.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Sage Business Cloud from R179/mo; Payroll from R199/mo; Accounting+Payroll bundle available

socialSentiment.summary: SA compliance capabilities highly valued; pricing and support complaints common.
